events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. The decay test failed: micron level rose from 425 to 1495 (Δ1070, ~107 microns/min) over 10 minutes with no leveling — indicative of an active leak rather than normal moisture outgassing. Disposition: fail, do not charge; nitrogen leak-search, repair, re-evacuate below 500 microns, and re-test before proceeding.
